action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet50+pretrain+RandAug+strong 1/counts sampler+CE reached ~45% val_acc (bal_acc likely similar) but many-shot collapsed to 0; loss plateaus high due to hard tail samples; iter time ~4min. Analysis: Over-aggressive rebalancing hurts head classes; CE insufficient for LT imbalance (gamma helps focus hard ex.); pretrained FT needs milder sampler (sqrt) + stable lower LR. Decision: Add FocalLoss(gamma=2), set sampler weights=1/sqrt(counts), use AdamW lr=5e-4 + 100 epochs cosine; keep best checkpoint by val_acc; submit_eval for improved baseline.
